disclaimer: Operations action-resolution records are local workflow provenance only. They document whether action-plan items are open, acknowledged, deferred, or resolved by an operator. Resolution does not authorize live data access, external submission, detections, discoveries, or external validation.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Quality-control remediation task acknowledged from local readiness dashboard; blocker remains tracked until validation evidence is refreshed.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: Local workflow record only; does not clear science or operations blockers.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Open alert review remains pending; negative evidence and open blockers must stay visible.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: No alert outcome is treated as external validation.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Validation-readiness follow-up deferred pending local fixture review and reproducibility checks.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: Deferral preserves uncertainty and does not approve live observation intake.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Curated intake remains deferred until local provenance checks and source metadata are complete.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: No network access, live data access, or external submission is authorized.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Submission provenance remains open; external dissemination controls must remain blocking.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: False positives remain the default hypothesis.

operations_action_resolution_records.evidence_note: Local review-deadline item resolved in the operator queue; this is workflow closure only.
operations_action_resolution_records.notes: Resolution does not assert a candidate outcome or external review.
